name: io.github.Servosity/datto-rmm-mcp
title: Datto RMM MCP
description: Every Datto RMM API operation, plus a local SQLite fleet store and fleet-wide analytics no other

environmentVariables.name: DATTO_RMM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Set the DATTO_RMM_API_KEY credential for the Datto RMM MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: DATTO_RMM_API_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Set the DATTO_RMM_API_SECRET_KEY credential for the Datto RMM MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: DATTO_RMM_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Set the DATTO_RMM_TOKEN credential for the Datto RMM MCP server.
